title: Confyg's Techpack
description: Techpack a la Mekanism with a hint of Vanilla additions.
body:
# Confyg's Techpack
This modpack is a Pack which was originally made for me and a couple of friends so that we could play together on a modded server with all the mods we like (or well, that match on this version.)
## ...Cool, but what does it actually do?
- This pack features tech mods such as:
- **Mekanism** (Mostly Mekanism, as its the main focus of this whole pack), 
- **Industrial Foregoing**
- ...and **Applied Energistics 2**

 However, this also has some extra "Quality of Life" mods, notably being:
- **Sophisticated Backpacks**
- **YUNG's worldgen mods** (EXCEPT the mineshafts)
- **Terralith** and **Tectonic**
- **Chipped**
- **Immersive Aircrafts**
  
It also has some extra performance mods like Sodium, Iris, yada yada. 

...And a whole bunch more fun mods!
(If you want an in depth list of the mods, check "Dependencies")

## but why should i play this, and not a different pack?
This is mostly made for people who enjoy mekanism and what it offers. its the main focus of the pack. if you prefer something like Create, AE2(i know its in the pack, my intend is only the usage of the storage though), or any other techmod, then you probably wont enjoy this.

I tried to keep this pack mostly lightweight yet also content filled.
### Suggestions? Please add me on Discord! (con_fygurated)
